title: lobelia intercedens
intro: Lobelia intercedens, also known as kalmia lobelia or snow plant, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the respiratory system and act as a bronchodilator, making it useful for treating conditions such as asthma and bronchitis. The health benefits of Lobelia intercedens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of Lobelia intercedens can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant in tincture form, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects.
